# Span Chain

> Deterministic replay, evals, and audit trails for teams shipping AI agents to production — backed by an immutable, hash-chain–verified ledger as the source of truth. A GhostFactory product.

Span Chain treats the agent *session* as the unit of analysis, not the individual LLM call. A recorded session replays deterministically and produces the same hash chain every time, so silent failures (HTTP 200, wrong answer) become inspectable instead of irreproducible.

## Key facts
- Session, not call: the whole run is the trace, parent/child span hierarchy intact.
- Hash-chain ledger: each entry is cryptographically linked to the last; tampering and dropped epochs are detectable.
- Deterministic replay: re-run a recorded session → identical chain.
- Evals & compare: run N agents/models on one task and diff side by side.
- OpenTelemetry-native: ingest via OTLP/HTTP JSON or a plain JSON endpoint.
- Audit trail: browsable, verifiable record of agent behavior.

## Links
- Site: https://spanchain.art
- Ecosystem: https://ghostfactory.art

## Status
Launching soon; in active development as part of the GhostFactory ecosystem.
